reason: The remediation creates a deny-all rule for fapolicyd and disables permissive mode, which can prevent execution of essential system binaries (e.g., sshd, bash) if proper exceptions are not added. This poses a clear risk of loss of console/SSH access or service disruption, requiring manual verification and planning.
estimated_impact: filesystems affected; potential loss of SSH/console access; service disruption; system instability if exceptions are missing
